text.title: fine-tuning-openai-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for fine-tuning-openai-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using different system prompts across training examples (e.g., varying the company name or tone).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model learns to associate different behaviors with different prompts, producing unpredictable results at inference with a single system prompt.
